name: mark.js
when_to_use: 需要在已渲染好的 DOM 文档/搜索结果里安全高亮任意关键词/正则/词组并逐个跳转命中时用它,而非手写 innerHTML 替换——原生会破坏跨节点结构、漏掉跨标签文本或引入 XSS。纯代码语法着色用 highlight.js/prism/shiki;富文本人工批注用 annotorious/recogito。
why_valuable: AI 默认手写高亮就是 innerHTML.replace,会在跨标签文本、变音符、词组匹配与 XSS 转义上失败,更做不到命中计数与逐个定位;mark.js 以 TextNode 级遍历把这些收敛成 mark()/markRegExp() 原生调用,不破坏原 DOM 结构。

data_in.note: mark.js 不自造 UI,它就地包裹已存在于 context 容器里的文本节点;context(要高亮的容器元素)由 boot 提供,keyword/regexp/options 才是 data。默认包裹元素是 <mark>(浏览器自带黄色底),自定义配色需 boot 追加 CSS。keyword 与 regexp 二选一。

schema.keyword: string | string[] —— 要高亮的关键词(内部会转义);多关键词传数组。要正则匹配改用 regexp 字段
schema.regexp?: string —— 传入则用 markRegExp(new RegExp(regexp, ...)),优先于 keyword;注意组会被忽略、始终匹配全部命中

options?._default: 省略时使用下列上游默认值
options?.className?: string —— 附加在包裹元素上的类名,默认 ''
options?.separateWordSearch?: boolean —— 空格拆成多词分别高亮,默认 true
options?.diacritics?: boolean —— 变音符模糊匹配,默认 true
options?.acrossElements?: boolean —— 跨标签匹配,默认 false
options?.done?: (marksTotal:number)=>void —— 高亮完成回调,marksTotal 为命中数

spec.note: mark.js 不创建容器也不设高度;此为承载被高亮文档的滚动容器建议高度(默认 400px,内容可撑开),mark.js 只在该容器内包裹文本。若显式设高,禁 vh/百分比高(铁律 3)。

example._why: keyword 可为字符串或数组、且与 regexp 二选一;minimal 钉死「多关键词高亮 + 自定义类名」这一最常用形态。

minimal.content: Mark.js can highlight words while preserving the original document structure.

uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;命中数由 options.done(total) 得到,消费 AI 可渲染「N 处命中」并用 ctx 内的 mark/.hl 节点做上一处/下一处跳转。
uplink.widget: 消费 AI 在自己的确认控件里读取 done(total) 命中数或遍历高亮节点,再拼 sendPrompt;本条不焊接统一事件出口。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 读取 done(total) 或高亮节点后自行调用 sendFollowUpMessage;本条不绑定统一事件出口。

carriers.widget: supported:mark.js 只在传入的 shadow 内容器上遍历文本节点包裹 <mark>,无 head 写入;自定义 className 配色需把样式 adopt 进 shadowRoot
carriers.codex: supported:纯 ESM + DOM 文本节点遍历,无 worker/wasm/uplink 依赖

isolation.evidence: mark.js@8.11.1 +esm default export `O as default` = vanilla Mark (jsDelivr bundle wraps /npm/mark.js@8.11.1/dist/mark.js, NOT the jQuery build — grep of bundle finds 0 'jquery'). @types/mark.js: constructor(context: string|HTMLElement|readonly HTMLElement[]|NodeList); mark(keyword:string|string[], options?:MarkOptions):void; markRegExp(regexp:RegExp, options?):void; markRanges(ranges, options?):void; unmark(options?):void — all boot symbols and options keys (element/className/separateWordSearch/accuracy/diacritics/acrossElements/caseSensitive/synonyms/ignorePunctuation/done) match. Verified footprint of /tmp bundle: 0 document.head, 0 createElement('style')/adoptedStyleSheets, 0 window|document.addEventListener, 0 document.body — mark.js only reads and wraps text nodes within the provided context element (DOMIterator scoped to context) and inserts <mark> (or options.element) nodes in-place. Fully scoped to the caller's container → shadow-safe. options.iframes defaults false (won't reach into iframes/other roots).

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to safely highlight arbitrary keywords, regexes, or phrases in an already-rendered DOM document/search result and navigate matches one by one, instead of hand-writing innerHTML replacement, which breaks cross-node structure, misses text across tags, or introduces XSS. For code syntax coloring use highlight.js/prism/shiki; for manual rich-text annotation use annotorious/recogito.
en.why_valuable: AI's default hand-written highlighting is innerHTML.replace, which fails on cross-tag text, diacritics, phrase matching, and XSS escaping, and cannot provide match counts or per-hit navigation. mark.js traverses TextNode values and reduces these problems to native mark()/markRegExp() calls without damaging the original DOM structure.

data_in.note: mark.js does not invent a UI; it wraps text nodes already present in the context container. context (the container to highlight) is supplied by boot, while keyword/regexp/options are data. The default wrapper is <mark> (browser-native yellow background); custom colors require boot to add CSS. Choose either keyword or regexp.

schema.keyword: string | string[] -- Keywords to highlight (escaped internally); pass an array for multiple keywords. Use regexp for regular-expression matching
schema.regexp?: string -- When provided, uses markRegExp(new RegExp(regexp, ...)) and takes precedence over keyword; groups are ignored and all matches are always selected

options?._default: When omitted, uses the following upstream defaults
options?.className?: string -- Class name added to the wrapper; default ''
options?.separateWordSearch?: boolean -- Split on spaces and highlight words separately; default true
options?.diacritics?: boolean -- Fuzzy diacritic matching; default true
options?.acrossElements?: boolean -- Match across tags; default false
options?.done?: (marksTotal:number)=>void -- Completion callback; marksTotal is the match count

spec.note: mark.js neither creates a container nor sets height. This is the recommended height for the scrolling container that holds the highlighted document (default 400px; content may expand it); mark.js only wraps text within that container. If height is explicit, vh/percentage height is prohibited (Rule 3).
